name: MHC_classII_DRB_gibbon
description: Nomascus leucogenys Nole-DRB paralog block. Gibbon-lineage MHC nomenclature uses 'Nole-' prefix (e.g. Nole-A, Nole-B, Nole-C). Trans-species polymorphism shared with human HLA; ape-specific paralog expansions and losses documented in Suntsova 2017 and T2T-ape 2024.

architecture.internal_structure: Ape MHC: extensive haplotype divergence, trans-species polymorphism, ape-lineage gene duplications (Patr-AL, Gogo-AL etc.).
